title: Red Solid Round Plastic Table Cover (213cm) 1 Count – Vibrant & Durable Party Essential for Easy Cleanup and Decoration
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: VIBRANT RED COLOR: a splash of color to your party with our red solid round plastic table cover - a perfect addition to birthday parties, bridal showers, baby showers, gender reveal parties, and more.

PREMIUM QUALITY & DURABLE MATERIAL: Our 213cm round plastic table cover is made of high-quality materials, ensuring long-lasting durability for a worry-free party experience. It's tear-resistant so your event stays mess-free.

EASY CLEANUP & REUSABLE: This practical table cover not only adds a pop of color to your event, but also makes post-party cleanup a breeze. Simply wipe off any spills or messes and reuse for future events, if desired.

1 COUNT PACK: This pack contains 1 red solid round plastic table cover, just the right amount for decorating a single table at your event. Combine with matching or contrasting tableware and decorations for a complete and stylish look.

VERSATILE DECORATION: Enhance your party setup at an affordable price, without sacrificing style. This versatile table cover can be used for indoor or outdoor events and is suitable for various occasions, making your table look refined and festive.
description: Product Description Bring a burst of festive red to your party proceedings with this Round Red Plastic Tablecloth. This eye-catching plastic table cover will add some rich colour to your special occasion, whilst protecting your table from stains and spills. The fiery red shade is ideal for a Christmas dinner, Valentine's Day party, and more. Disposable table covers also make your after party clean-up really quick and convenient. Coordinate this Plastic Red Tablecloth with our other red tableware and red party decorations, or mix and match with different solid colour party supplies to create a stylish setting for your special event. Safety Warning Warning: to avoid danger of suffocation, keep this plastic bag away from babies and children. Do not use in cribs, beds, carriages or playpens. This bag is not a toy.
